metadata.title: PrettyClaw
metadata.description: Visual Novel Agent UI for OpenClaw

settingsPanel.title: Settings
settingsPanel.description: Adjust general preferences and Gateway connection settings.
settingsPanel.chatFontDescription: Applies to the dialogue box and chat log.
settingsPanel.chatFontHelp: You can enter a value between {min}px and {max}px.
settingsPanel.ttsAutoplayDescription: Automatically plays character speech after each response.
settingsPanel.developerModeDescription: Show thinking and tool-calling payloads when restoring session history.
settingsPanel.gatewayDescription: Check the Gateway URL and token, then refresh the connection status.
settingsPanel.deviceAuthDescription: Connects directly to OpenClaw Gateway with a browser device identity. If pairing is required after the first connection, approve it on the Gateway host.

issues.pairingRequiredDescription: Approve this browser on the Gateway host, then reconnect.
issues.deviceIdentityTitle: Browser device identity could not be created
issues.deviceIdentityDescription: Open the app from `http://localhost:3000` or `http://127.0.0.1:3000` and reconnect.
issues.authDescription: Check the Gateway URL and token again.
issues.deviceTokenTitle: The saved device token is invalid
issues.deviceTokenDescription: Clear the saved device token and reconnect. If the same error repeats, enter the Gateway token again.
